name: scout-reports
description: Report management: list, show, and delete saved health check, gather, and crawl reports
author: inovacc

tools.name: report_list
tools.description: List all saved reports (health checks, gathers, crawls) with ID, type, URL, issues count, and creation date

tools.name: report_show
tools.description: Show the full AI-consumable text of a saved report by ID

tools.name: report_delete
tools.description: Delete a saved report by ID
